chunks.title: Elihu Introduces His Argument
chunks.reason: Elihu calls for attention and summarizes Job's claim that God has removed his justice.

chunks.title: God's Justice and Sovereignty
chunks.reason: Elihu argues that God rewards according to work and rules over the earth without partiality.

chunks.title: God's Omniscience and Judgment
chunks.reason: Elihu describes how God sees all ways of man and judges the wicked without delay.

chunks.title: Conclusion Against Job
chunks.reason: Elihu challenges Job to accept chastisement and concludes that Job speaks without knowledge.
